crime.value: Murder by serial killer Jack Wilson
crime.quote: Yes, i was there, i killed him...

culprit_and_motive.value: Jack Wilson, former police detective turned serial killer - motive unknown
culprit_and_motive.quote: I'm Jack Wilson, former police detective, current serial killer

investigator.value: Fred Reynolds, writer researching crime novel
investigator.quote: Im writer and im working on my new crime novel

suspect_architecture.value: Two-person dynamic: Jack Wilson (self-confessed serial killer, former police detective) and Fred Reynolds (writer seeking material). Jack is primary suspect with explicit confession, Fred becomes reluctant accomplice through blackmail reversal
suspect_architecture.quote: I'm Jack Wilson, former police detective, current serial killer, are you happy now?

clue_fairness.value: Phone confession overheard by witness - reader gets same information as Fred simultaneously when Jack says 'Yes, i was there, i killed him...' on cellphone
clue_fairness.quote: Yes, i was there, i killed him...

social_world.value: Power reversal dynamic: former police detective turned criminal, civilian writer gaining leverage through blackmail threat, institutional authority (police) as external threat both characters navigate
social_world.quote: I'm Jack Wilson, former police detective, current serial killer

media_and_audience.value: Writer character explicitly seeking to document and narrativize criminal experience for crime novel, representing how criminal acts become commodified stories
media_and_audience.quote: Im writer and im working on my new crime novel, so i was thinking that it would be great to come with you

_meta.title: ebook jack wilson on the edge part 1
